text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm passing by the<n>training course...

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Just, um... forget you saw anything,<n>okay? I'm
sure you don't want to<n>remember that anyway.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, maybe I can sing in tune, but<n>that's not the
same thing as being a<n>good singer.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
My grandmother would always say<n>that a concert
is an opportunity to give<n>thanks.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Even if you sing well, it doesn't<n>matter if your
heart's not into it.
choice_data_list: Sounds like she was a strict judge.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Heh, I think that's just how much<n>she loved the
Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
She was actually one of the founding<n>members
who fought to get the<n>Grand Concert off the
ground. That's<n>what I heard from my mother,
anyway.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Apparently. I never knew until I<n>started
researching the concert—you<n>can imagine my
surprise.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Heh, I wish I could introduce her to<n>the person I
told you about...

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Ah, sorry! Look at me rambling about<n>myself.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
I will say, though... From what I've<n>heard so far, I
really do think<n><chrname> is a good
singer.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
So when it comes time for her to<n>stand on stage, I
hope you'll pay<n>close attention.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Because I think her song will be filled<n>with
gratitude for the person who's<n>always stood by
her side.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, I get the chance to<n>observe
<chrname> at one of<n>her dance lessons.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her singing seems to ooze with<n>emotion.
